name: Absolute Direction
notes: Always know which way is north. +3 to Body Sense and Navigation.

name: Acute Hearing
notes: +1 per level to Hearing rolls.

name: Acute Taste and Smell
notes: +1 per level to Taste and Smell rolls.

name: Acute Touch
notes: +1 per level to Touch rolls.

name: Acute Vision
notes: +1 per level to Vision rolls.

name: Administrative Rank
notes: Status and authority within a civil bureaucracy.

name: Allies
costFormula: Varies by power level and frequency of appearance
notes: NPC friends who assist you. Cost depends on their CP and how often they show up.

name: Altered Time Rate
notes: Experience time faster. Gives one extra maneuver per turn per level.

name: Alternate Identity
notes: A completely documented false identity.

name: Ambidexterity
notes: No off-hand penalty (-4) in combat or skills.

name: Amphibious
notes: Swim at your basic move. No penalties for acting underwater.

name: Animal Empathy
notes: You can sense animals' emotions and communicate basically.

name: Appearance
notes: Improves reactions from others. Choose level: Attractive, Handsome/Beautiful, etc.

name: Arm DX
costFormula: 12 pts for one arm, 16 pts for two
notes: Higher DX for arm-based tasks only.

name: Arm ST
notes: Higher ST strictly for lifting, striking, or grappling with arms.

name: Binding
notes: Ranged attack that roots or grapples a target. Strength equals level.

name: Blessed
notes: Favored by a deity. Gives special insights or heroic boosts.

name: Brachiator
notes: Swing through trees easily. +2 to Climbing.

name: Breath-Holding
notes: Multiply time you can hold your breath. 1 level = x2 time, 2 levels = x4 time, etc.

name: Catfall
notes: Subtract 5 yards from a fall for damage purposes; always land on feet.

name: Chameleon
notes: Blend into surroundings. +2 per level to Stealth when naked or in camo.

name: Channeling
notes: Spirits can speak through you.

name: Charisma
notes: +1 per level on reaction rolls, Influence skills, and Leadership.

name: Claim to Hospitality
costFormula: 1 to 10 points depending on group size/wealth
notes: Can expect food, shelter, and basic aid from a specific group.

name: Claws
costFormula: Blunt (3), Hooves (3), Sharp (5), Talons (8), Long Talons (11)
notes: Natural striking weapons on hands or feet. Adds to unarmed damage.

name: Clerical Investment
notes: Ordained member of a religion. Gives social privileges and reaction bonuses.

name: Clinging
notes: Walk on walls and ceilings at half move.

name: Combat Reflexes
notes: +1 to all active defenses, +2 to Fright Checks, +6 to recover from mental stun.

name: Common Sense
notes: GM will warn you if your proposed action is obviously stupid.

name: Compartmentalized Mind
notes: Multiple independent minds. Can take extra mental maneuvers in combat.

name: Contacts
costFormula: Varies by skill level, frequency, and reliability
notes: NPCs who provide information. Cost varies greatly.

name: Cultural Adaptability
notes: Familiar with all human cultures. No cultural penalties.

name: Cultural Familiarity
notes: Familiarity with one specific culture other than your native one.

name: Damage Resistance
notes: Natural armor. Subtract DR from basic damage before applying injury.

name: Danger Sense
notes: GM rolls once against your Perception to warn you of hidden danger.

name: Daredevil
notes: +1 to all rolls when taking unnecessary risks. Can reroll critical failures.

name: Dark Vision
notes: See perfectly in absolute darkness. Colors cannot be distinguished.

name: Destiny
notes: A predetermined positive fate. GM enforces the details.

name: Digital Mind
notes: Immune to telepathy and mind control. Vulnerable to computer hacking/viruses.

name: Discriminatory Hearing
notes: Memorize and identify sounds and voices perfectly. +4 to Shadowing.

name: Discriminatory Smell
notes: Memorize and identify odors perfectly. +4 to Tracking.

name: Discriminatory Taste
notes: Identify chemical composition of anything you taste.

name: Does Not Breathe
notes: Immune to suffocation, drowning, and inhaled toxins.

name: Does Not Eat or Drink
notes: Immune to starvation and dehydration.

name: Does Not Sleep
notes: Never need to sleep. Immune to sleep-inducing effects.

name: Dominance
notes: Those you infect become your slaves.

name: Double-Jointed
notes: +5 to Climbing, Escape, and Acrobatics rolls to break free.

name: Duplication
notes: Split into multiple identical bodies. Base cost per extra body.

name: Eidetic Memory
notes: Remember general details automatically, or exact details (Photographic).

name: Elastic Skin
notes: Change facial features at will. +4 to Disguise.

name: Empathy
notes: Feel others' emotions and motives. +3 to Detect Lies, Fortune-Telling, Psychology.

name: Enhanced Defenses
notes: Bonus to a specific active defense.

name: Enhanced Move
notes: Doubles top speed for one movement mode per level.

name: Enhanced Time Sense
notes: Process information instantly. Includes Combat Reflexes.

name: Enhanced Tracking
notes: Aim at multiple targets simultaneously. +1 target per level.

name: Extended Lifespan
notes: Doubles the time between aging rolls per level.

name: Extra Arms
notes: Extra functioning arms. Cost per extra arm.

name: Extra Attack
notes: One extra attack per turn per level (must use a different weapon/limb unless modified).

name: Extra Head
notes: Extra functioning head. Hard to surprise or decapitate.

name: Extra Legs
notes: Harder to knock down. Modifies movement and carrying capacity.

name: Extra Life
notes: Return from certain death once per level.

name: Extra Mouth
notes: Can bite while grappling.

name: Fearlessness
notes: +1 per level to Will against Fright Checks and Intimidation.

name: Filter Lungs
notes: Immune to airborne toxins and dust.

name: Fit
notes: +1 to all HT rolls. Recover FP at double normal rate.

name: Flight
notes: Fly through the air. Speed depends on Basic Speed.

name: Fur
notes: Provides basic protection from cold. Functions as a Perk-level Advantage.

name: G-Experience
notes: Acclimated to a specific non-standard gravity (e.g., 0G or heavy gravity). 1 to 10 points depending on increments.

name: Gadgeteer
notes: Can invent and build new gadgets rapidly and with fewer bugs.

name: Gunslinger
notes: Add weapon's Accuracy to one-handed firearms even when moving or not taking an Aim maneuver.

name: Hard to Kill
notes: +1 per level to HT rolls made to stay alive at negative HP.

name: Hard to Subdue
notes: +1 per level to HT rolls to resist knockdown and stunning.

name: Healing
notes: Can restore HP to others by spending your own FP.

name: Hermaphromorph
notes: Can voluntarily change sex over a period of time.

name: High Manual Dexterity
notes: +1 per level to fine motor tasks like Pickpocket, Knot-Tying, and Sewing.

name: High Pain Threshold
notes: Never suffer shock penalties when injured. +3 on rolls to resist physical torture.

name: High TL
notes: Your personal Tech Level is higher than the campaign's average by 1 per level.

name: Higher Purpose
notes: A driving goal that grants a +1 to all rolls when actively pursuing it.

name: Illuminated
notes: You understand the hidden truths of the universe. Immune to mind control related to secrets.

name: Independent Income
notes: Guaranteed income equal to 1% of campaign starting wealth per level.

name: Indomitable
notes: Immune to Influence skills (Diplomacy, Fast-Talk, Intimidation, etc.) from others.

name: Infravision
notes: See heat patterns. No penalties for darkness if the target emits heat.

name: Injury Tolerance
notes: Your body reacts differently to damage. Specific type must be chosen.

name: Innate Attack
costFormula: Cost per die varies by damage type (e.g., Crushing 5/die, Burn 5/die)
notes: A natural or supernatural attack. Calculate cost based on damage type and dice.

name: Insubstantiality
notes: Can become immaterial. Pass through walls and ignore physical attacks.

name: Intuition
notes: GM will occasionally give you good guesses when faced with choices.

name: Intuitive Mathematician
notes: Perform complex calculations instantly in your head.

name: Invisibility
notes: Cannot be seen with normal vision. Machines or animals may require modifiers.

name: Jumper
notes: Jump between dimensions, timelines, or spirit worlds.

name: Language Talent
notes: You learn languages easily. Comprehension levels cost half price.

name: Language
notes: Fluency in a specific language (Broken, Accented, or Native).

name: Legal Enforcement Powers
notes: Official badge and authority to enforce the law.

name: Legal Immunity
notes: Exempt from local laws (e.g., Diplomatic Immunity).

name: Less Sleep
notes: Need one hour less sleep per level.

name: Longevity
notes: Fail aging rolls only on a 17 or 18.

name: Luck
notes: Reroll a single die roll up to 3 times and take the best result.

name: Magery
notes: Magical aptitude. Adds to IQ for learning/casting spells and sensing magic.

name: Magic Resistance
notes: +1 per level to resist magic. Prevents you from casting spells.

name: Mana Damper
notes: Lowers the local mana level around you.

name: Mana Enhancer
notes: Raises the local mana level around you.

name: Metabolism Control
notes: Slow bodily functions to feign death or survive without oxygen.

name: Microscopic Vision
notes: Act as a magnifying glass or microscope.

name: Mind Control
notes: Directly control the actions of another conscious being.

name: Mind Probe
notes: Read the memories of another subject.

name: Mind Reading
notes: Read the surface thoughts of another being.

name: Mind Shield
notes: +1 per level to resist mental intrusions or mind control.

name: Modular Abilities
costFormula: Varies by type (e.g., Computer Brain, Cosmic Power)
notes: A pool of points that can be reallocated to different traits on the fly.

name: Morph
notes: Shape-shift into entirely different templates.

name: Musical Ability
notes: +1 per level to Musical Instrument, Singing, and related arts.

name: Night Vision
notes: Ignore -1 in darkness penalties per level (max 9).

name: No Hangover
notes: You never suffer from a hangover after drinking alcohol.

name: Oracle
notes: You can interpret omens and signs to get vague hints about the future.

name: Parabolic Hearing
notes: Focus hearing on a specific distant sound. +1 per level to Hearing.

name: Patron
costFormula: Varies widely based on power, equipment, and frequency of appearance
notes: A powerful individual or organization that assists you.

name: Payload
notes: You have an internal compartment. Holds 1/10 of Basic Lift per level.

name: Penetrating Voice
notes: Your voice can be heard clearly over loud ambient noise.

name: Perfect Balance
notes: Always keep your footing. +1 to Acrobatics, Climbing, and Piloting.

name: Peripheral Vision
notes: Unusually wide arc of vision. Lower penalties for flank attacks.

name: Pitiable
notes: You look vulnerable. +3 to reaction rolls from those who might pity you.

name: Plant Empathy
notes: Sense the health, emotions, and needs of plants.

name: Precognition
notes: Catch glimpses of the future.

name: Protected Sense
costFormula: 5 points per protected sense (Vision, Hearing, etc.)
notes: Sense cannot be easily overloaded or deafened/blinded by intense stimuli.

name: Puppet
notes: An entity specially prepared for you to possess or mind-control.
